Terminal osseous dysplasia 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/condition/terminal-osseous-dysplasia/ 
Terminal osseous dysplasia 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
Description 
Terminal osseous dysplasia is a disorder primarily involving skeletal abnormalities and certain skin changes. It is a member of a group of related conditions called otopalatodigital spectrum disorders, which also includes otopalatodigital syndrome type 1 , otopalatodigital syndrome type 2 , frontometaphyseal dysplasi
